title: Gaveno Cavailia Super Soft Faux Fur Fleece Plain Throw Blanket, Mink, Double, 150 x 200 cm
features: SUMPTUOUSLY SOFT BED THROW: This beautiful blanket for bed or settee is expertly crafted to be highly durable as well as fabulously soft against your skin.
WARM AND COSY FAUX FUR THROW: Ultra-light and breathable fluffy soft throw, this stunning plain throw blanket is the ideal companion for cold winter nights.
EXQUISITELY CRAFTED SOFT BLANKETS: The greatest of care and high-quality material is used to manufacture this throw for the sofa, ideal for winter.
EASY CARE BED BLANKET: This fabulous thermal throw blanket is the update to the furnishings you have been looking for.
As we Evolve, our homes should too. To make your home as comfortable as attractive, please visit the Amazon Official GC GAVENO CAVAILIA store.
